info.name: Notification Service
info.description:
# Notification Service

Base URL: `{{notification_service}}` (port `8090`)

Handles in-app notification sending and querying. Notifications are stored in H2 (dev) or MySQL (prod).

## Status enum

- `INFO` — General information
- `WARNING` — Warning or alert
- `SUCCESS` — Successful operation
- `ERROR` — Error condition

Types are free-form strings (e.g. `ESTIMATE_READY`, `RECOMMENDATIONS_READY`, `PRICE_ALERT`).

request.description:
Sends a notification with `INFO` status.

**Expected:** 201 Created

Sends a notification with `WARNING` status.

**Expected:** 201 Created

Negative test -- sends a request with null userId, blank type/content, and null status.

**Expected:** 400 Bad Request (validation errors)

Sends a notification with `SUCCESS` status.

**Expected:** 201 Created

Sends a notification with `ERROR` status.

**Expected:** 201 Created

Negative test -- sends an invalid enum status value.

**Expected:** 400 Bad Request (invalid enum)

Negative test -- sends a request without the `status` field.

**Expected:** 400 Bad Request (status @NotNull validation)

Retrieves all notification logs across all users. Returns an empty array if none exist.

**Expected:** 200 OK

Retrieves all notifications for a specific user. Returns an empty array if the user has no notifications.

**Expected:** 200 OK

item.name: Get Logs By User Id No Results

request.description:
Negative test -- queries notifications for a user with no logs. Returns an empty array, not a 404.

**Expected:** 200 OK (empty list)

Retrieves a single notification log by its ID.

**Expected:** 200 OK

item.name: Get Log By Id Not Found

request.description:
Negative test -- tries to fetch a notification log that does not exist.

**Expected:** 404 Not Found
